camera.title: Camera Capabilities
camera.summary: MIPI CSI camera at /dev/video0, 640x480, OpenCV 4.10.0, no ML frameworks

imu.title: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit)
imu.summary: Onboard IMU via ESP32, accelerometer + gyroscope at 20Hz

motors.title: Motors / Servos
motors.summary: 12 servos via ESP32, controlled via servos_set_position API

camera_person_follow.title: Camera Person Follower
camera_person_follow.summary: Person following using background subtraction + centroid tracking via OpenCV

script_invocation.title: Script Invocation Capability
script_invocation.summary: All script invocation paths: tasks.json offloading, minipupper_control.py, scripts/, custom/ modules, and operator internal queues

bowling_court_activation.title: Bowling Court Activation
bowling_court_activation.summary: Robot bowling simulation: approach trot, body roll swing, crouch release, look up follow-through

camera_live_feed.title: Camera Live Video Feed
camera_live_feed.summary: Live video feed from MIPI CSI camera to ST7789 LCD using OpenCV capture + PIL resize. Supports both simple blocking and threaded approaches at ~10-15 FPS.

camera_live_feed_on_screen.title: Live Camera Feed on ST7789 LCD
camera_live_feed_on_screen.summary: Continuous live video feed from MIPI CSI camera to onboard ST7789 LCD at ~16 FPS. Resizes 640x480 → 320x240, handles graceful shutdown, supports duration limits and video recording.

camera_video_feed.title: Camera Video Feed — Existing Capability
camera_video_feed.summary: Real-time video feed from MIPI CSI camera to ST7789 LCD is an existing, tested capability via custom/camera_live_feed_on_screen/main.py (~16 FPS).
